info.title: StellarisSaveParser.Cli
info.description: A command-line tool for parsing and analyzing Stellaris save files

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Stellaris Save Parser CLI - A tool for working with Stellaris save files

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all Stellaris save files found on this system

commands.description: Display a summary of a Stellaris save file

commands.name: version
commands.description: Display the version of the tool
